title: Athlete's Foot Be Gone: 11 Herbal Creams for Runners
description: Eucalyptus globulus creams have been found to help with athlete's foot due to their antifungal and antibacterial properties. The creams contain eucalyptol, a compound that has been shown to inhibit the growth of fungi and bacteria that cause athlete's foot, such as Trichophyton and Epidermophyton. Eucalyptol also has anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe and calm the skin, reducing the itching and discomfort associated with athlete's foot. To use eucalyptus globulus cr...
